output.answer: The latest version of Microsoft Office 2010 is 14.0.7252.5000.
output.formatted:
The latest version of Microsoft Office 2010 is 14.0.7252.5000.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT ?version WHERE {
  wd:Q689579 wdt:P348 ?version .
}
```

Execution result:
Got 1 row and 1 column:
| version        |
| -------------- |
| 14.0.7252.5000 |
